text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Fine Motion's debut. Though, at the
moment...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a food court! There are pork buns and
takoyaki... It all looks so good! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Can we take a look later? I want to walk around
and try all the different food.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what's this on the ground? Cleat prints?! How
curious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is filled with curiosity toward
everything she sees. That curiosity is one of her
finer points, but she's about to take part in a big
race.
choice_data_list: (I hope she can maintain her focus...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You're concerned about me, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll be fine. I just want to have fun today!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I want to enjoy this to the fullest, I have to give
it my all, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I may have only just found out recently how
wonderful it is to really run...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I already know that if I throw myself into the
sport completely, it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why there's no need to worry. I'm taking
this seriously!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm still green, but can you rest easy
knowing that at least?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, good. Now then, it's about time for me to
get suited up. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I had no idea my heart could pound like
this.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Can you hear it too, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Really?! But it's beating so heavily! Hehehe. ♪
choice_data_list: Make sure it doesn't jump right out.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm finally running in the Twinkle Series... I must
savor every moment! ♪
